name: Eliminate waterfalls (React/Next.js)
description: CRITICAL: remove sequential awaits and unblock streaming with Suspense boundaries. Includes: cheap conditions first, defer await, Promise.all, start promises early, dependency-based parallelization, strategic Suspense.

metadata.intent: Eliminate server-side and route-handler waterfalls for large latency wins

must_not: Accidental waterfall chains in API routes/server actions
conventions: If you can restructure into separate async components + Suspense, do it.

steps.description: Check cheap sync guards before awaiting flags/remote values. Example: if `someCondition` is false, skip `await getFlag()` entirely by nesting the await under the guard.
Defer awaits until the branch where results are actually used (avoid blocking early-return paths).
Use `Promise.all()` for independent operations; don’t serialize unrelated network/db calls.
In route handlers/server actions: start promises immediately (`const p = foo()`), then `await` later after cheap guards/auth when needed.

Parallelize partial dependency chains by creating promises first (or using a dependency graph approach). Avoid: `await user; await profile(user.id)` when profile can start via `userPromise.then(...)`.
Use Suspense boundaries so layout renders immediately and only the data-dependent subtree awaits. Prefer streaming UI over blocking the entire page.
